requestedAction: Publish one exact owner-approved Instagram post for @agdigitalz.
scope: If converted into an active approved lock later, this may authorize one exact Instagram post ID only. It does not authorize scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, additional posts, paid tools, credential storage in repo, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner revokes it, expiration passes, the post ID differs from the exact approved post, the target account differs from Instagram @agdigitalz, the post content changes after approval, account state is revoked, expired, or blocked, or any scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears.

evidence.reference: Owner must approve one exact future social post ID before publishing.
